essence: Maintains, repairs, and configures unmanned aerial systems and their payloads for reliable field operations.

identity.title: Drone Technician
identity.summary: Handles hardware repairs, sensor integration, firmware updates, and pre‑flight checks to keep drone fleets operational.

salary.notes: Technicians with avionics or sensor specialisms can command higher rates.

qualifications: Experience with electronics, soldering, and small‑aircraft systems
Familiarity with drone firmware and payload integration
Ability to troubleshoot sensors and communications
Good workshop skills and parts sourcing knowledge

lifestyle.description: Workshop and field balance; frequent hands‑on repair work and collaboration with operators and engineers to resolve faults quickly.

habits: Performs component‑level repairs and firmware updates
Maintains spares inventory and repair logs
